steps.title: Run `bun run agent:prepare-worker-surface -- <feature-branch-name>` to ensure a worker is ready, create the worker-hosted feature-branch worktree from `origin/development`, run `bun install`, and print the resulting `start_command`
Merge any additionally required upstream into the prepared worker-hosted feature-branch worktree
Connect through a persistent SSH session into the prepared worker worktree using the printed `start_command`
Run the required pre-change build verification in the prepared worker-hosted feature-branch worktree
Start the worker-local preview or runtime surface needed for the intended verification path
Open the intended verification surface in `agent-browser`; if no UI changes are expected, open Agent Chat
Capture a pre-change screenshot of the UI that will be updated, or capture Agent Chat if no UI changes are expected
Summarize what the pre-change screenshot shows
Is the worker preflight verification healthy?

decision.prompt: Is the worker preflight verification healthy?
